roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT MOT TO CLARIFY CRIMINAL PROTECTIVE ORDER - FILED

/CAL  SENTENCE/TWS/CH3 ISS CPROB PROB 2 Y PJ 1D/CTS 1/CTORD  AS A CONDITION OF THE COURT PROBATION, DEFENDANT IS TO ATTEND 25 ANGER MANAGEMENT CLASSES,  DA REBECCA LOUIE HAS REPRESENTED TO THIS COURT THAT THE 25 ANGER MANAGEMENT CLASSES ARE COMPLETED/SATERM/SAORD/X: MARIO EDGARDO SIBRIAN MUST NOT HARASS, STRIKE, THREATEN, ASSAULT (SEXUALLY OR OTHERWISE), FOLLOW, STALK,MOLEST, DESTROY OR DAMAGE PERSONAL OR REAL PROPERTY, DISTURB THE PEACE, KEEP UNDER SURVEILLANCE OR BLOCK MOVEMENTS OF THE PROTECTED PERSON: ASHLEY VIRGINA MARSHALL/X:MARIO SIBRIAN IS NOT PROHIBITED FROM COHABITATING WITH ASHLEY VIRGINA MARSHALL/X: THE DEFENSE DUENAS MOTION TO STAY FINES AND FEESIS DENIED/VF2:150/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/DISM
/CAL  CHANGE OF PLEA/X  THE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO ADD A MISDEMEANOR COUT 3 PC242 IS GRANTED/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OFNL/DEFT ADV NL: 3/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/BE/
/CAL: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/NTW/LD: 11-25-19/X: NAMED VICTIM IS ALLOWEDTO ADDRESS THE COURT,/X: THE COURT WILL NOT MODIFY THE STAY AWAY ORDER TODAY,/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
/CAL:JURY TRIAL/X:DEFENSE MAKE AN ORAL 1050 MOTION/MO GRTD/GTWM/VD:LASTDAY OF 06-13-19 AND JURY TRIAL/X:THE PEOPLE HAVE NO OBJECTION, THEY ARE NOT READY FOR TRIAL/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/SB:2HR/

/CAL:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/WIT SWORN DA: ASHLEE MARSHALL/ARG&SUB/CTORD:THECPO WILL BE MODIFIED ONLY AS TO BOXES '16' & 'B' BEING CHECKED AS TO SEEING HIS CHILDREN/SATERM/SA1:ASHLEE V MARSHALL/SA2:419 O'FARRELL ST, SF CA//X:BOX '16B' IS CHECKED/SAORD2/SAORD3/SAORD/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/DOPU: NO DISPO/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/987,2/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/GTWM/SA1:ASHLEE VIRGINIA MARSHALL/SA2:419 O'FARRELL ST,, S,F, CA/SAORD/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/DAWF/
/CAL TRIAL/TEXT TRANS TO DEPT 14/TRANS 14 FORTHWITH FOR DISPO/
/CAL:DEFENSE MOTION TO CLARIFY CPO/X:COURT AND COUNSEL TO DISCUSS MATTER INFORMALLY IN CHAMBERS ON 10-8-19/X:FUTURE DATE CONFIRMED/
